productDisplayName: Q&Q Attractive Men Orange Dial Watch
description: Case Style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case, has a fixed bezel Dial Style: Orange dial with a tachymeter inside, branding on the dial, steel and white coloured hands and steel coloured hour marks Features: Screw to reset time Strap Style: Orange coloured strap with a tang clasp and holes to customise fit Water resistant up to 10 BAR Warranty: 1 year
